hyperedges.label: News Ingestion Pipeline: Fetch → Deduplicate → Process → Store
Map UI Rendering: Pins API → MapContainer → BriefedMap + PinCard + TopicFilter
Shared PinTopic Taxonomy across types, components, and DB
AI Processing Layer: client + summarize + geoTag use shared anthropic client and Claude model to enrich pins
Prompt Template → LLM Call → Structured Output flow for both summarization and geo-tagging
Map UI Layer: BriefedMap renders geojson pins with topic colors and cluster interaction, CheckInStrip tracks read progress

nodes.label: LLM Wrapper Principle (never call API directly from business logic)
nodes.norm_label: llm wrapper principle (never call api directly from business logic)

nodes.label: Prompts-as-Files Principle (all prompts in /prompts as separate files)
nodes.norm_label: prompts-as-files principle (all prompts in /prompts as separate files)

nodes.label: Graceful Fallback Principle (fail gracefully on LLM failure)
nodes.norm_label: graceful fallback principle (fail gracefully on llm failure)

nodes.label: Retry + Timeout Principle (every external API call)
nodes.norm_label: retry + timeout principle (every external api call)

nodes.label: Two-Step GeoTag (Claude extracts location → Mapbox geocodes coordinates)
nodes.norm_label: two-step geotag (claude extracts location → mapbox geocodes coordinates)

nodes.label: AGENTS.md Next.js Agent Rules (read node_modules docs)
nodes.norm_label: agents.md next.js agent rules (read node_modules docs)

links.note: The SVG file contains a file/document icon graphic
Icon has a document shape path with folded top-right corner (dogear), typical file icon convention
Icon contains three horizontal line shapes at y=5, y=8, y=11 representing text lines in a document
Generic file icon, may be used as UI asset for file-related UI components or is a default Next.js scaffold asset
Located in /public directory of a Next.js project; likely a default boilerplate asset from Create Next App
The SVG file is the official Vercel logo — a white upward-pointing triangle on a transparent background, consistent with Vercel's brand mark.
This is the default Next.js boilerplate logo asset
File resides in the public/ directory

links.notes: Same node referenced under two IDs for schema compliance
globe.svg placed in /public is a default Next.js scaffolded asset
A globe icon is thematically aligned with Briefed's world-map news concept

links.context: window.svg resides in the public/ directory
SVG icon in public/ is served as a static asset by the Next.js application
SVG depicts a browser/application window UI element with three circular window control dots (traffic-light style) and a rectangular frame, rendered at 16x16 viewBox in grey (#666)
public/ directory is the static assets folder for the Next.js app
